name: cdp-agentkit-core

metadata.name: cdp-agentkit-core
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
# Agentkit Core
Framework agnostic primitives that are meant to be composable and used via Agentkit framework extensions.

You can find all of the supported actions under `./cdp_agentkit_core/actions`

## Contributing
See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for more information.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.mint_nft.mint_nft
documentation:
Mint an NFT (ERC-721) to a specified destination address onchain via a contract invocation.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to trade the asset from.
    contract_address (str): The contract address of the NFT (ERC-721) to mint, e.g. `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`.
    destination (str): The destination address that will receive the NFT onchain, e.g. `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`.

Returns:
    str: A message containing the NFT mint details.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.mint_nft.MintNftInput
documentation: Input argument schema for mint NFT action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.mint_nft.MintNftAction
documentation: Mint NFT action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.deploy_token.deploy_token
documentation:
Deploy an ERC20 token smart contract.

Args:
    wallet (wallet): The wallet to deploy the Token from.
    name (str): The name of the token (e.g., "My Token")
    symbol (str): The token symbol (e.g., "USDC", "MEME", "SYM")
    total_supply (str): The total supply of tokens to mint (e.g., "1000000")

Returns:
    str: A message containing the deployed token contract address and details

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.deploy_token.DeployTokenInput
documentation: Input argument schema for deploy token action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.deploy_token.DeployTokenAction
documentation: Deploy token action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.account_mentions.account_mentions
documentation:
Get the authenticated Twitter (X) user account mentions.

Args:
    client (tweepy.Client): The Twitter (X) client used to authenticate with.
    account_id (str): The Twitter (X) account id to  get mentions for.

Returns:
    str: A message containing account mentions for the authenticated user context.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.account_mentions.AccountMentionsInput
documentation: Input argument schema for Twitter account mentions action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.account_mentions.AccountMentionsAction
documentation: Twitter (X) account mentions action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.post_tweet.post_tweet
documentation:
Post tweet to Twitter.

Args:
    client (tweepy.Client): The tweepy client to use.
    tweet (str): The text of the tweet to post to twitter. Tweets can be maximum 280 characters.

Returns:
    str: A message containing the result of the post action and the tweet.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.post_tweet.PostTweetInput
documentation: Input argument schema for twitter post tweet action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.post_tweet.PostTweetAction
documentation: Twitter (X) post tweet action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.action.TwitterAction
documentation: Twitter Action Base Class.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.post_tweet_reply.post_tweet_reply
documentation:
Post tweet reply to Twitter.

Args:
    client (tweepy.Client): The tweepy client to use.
    tweet_id (str): The id of the tweet to reply to in twitter.
    tweet_reply (str): The text of the reply to post in reponse to a tweet on twitter.

Returns:
    str: A message containing the result of the reply action and any associated data.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.post_tweet_reply.PostTweetReplyInput
documentation: Input argument schema for twitter post tweet reply action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.post_tweet_reply.PostTweetReplyAction
documentation: Twitter (X) post tweet reply action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.social.twitter.account_details.account_details
documentation:
Get the authenticated Twitter (X) user account details.

Args:
    client (tweepy.Client): The Twitter (X) client used to authenticate with.

Returns:
    str: A message containing account details for the authenticated user context.

documentation: Input argument schema for Twitter account details action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.get_balance.get_balance
documentation:
Get balance for all addresses in the wallet for a given asset.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to get the balance for.
    asset_id (str): The asset ID to get the balance for (e.g., "eth", "usdc", or a valid contract address like "0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e")

Returns:
    str: A message containing the balance information of all addresses in the wallet.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.get_balance.GetBalanceInput
documentation: Input argument schema for get balance action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.get_balance.GetBalanceAction
documentation: Get wallet balance action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.request_faucet_funds.request_faucet_funds
documentation:
Request test tokens from the faucet for the default address in the wallet.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to receive tokens
    asset_id (str | None): The optional asset ID to request from the faucet. Accepts "eth" or "usdc". When omitted, defaults to the network's native asset.

Returns:
    str: Confirmation message with transaction details

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.request_faucet_funds.RequestFaucetFundsInput
documentation: Input argument schema for request faucet funds action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.request_faucet_funds.RequestFaucetFundsAction
documentation: Request faucet funds action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.get_all_cdp_actions
documentation: Retrieve all subclasses of CdpAction defined in the package.
WARNING: All new CdpAction subclasses must be imported above, otherwise they will not be discovered
by get_all_cdp_actions(). The import ensures the class is registered as a subclass of CdpAction.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.get_wallet_details.get_wallet_details
documentation:
Get a wallet's details.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to trade the asset from.

Returns:
    str: A message containing the wallet details.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.get_wallet_details.GetWalletDetailsInput
documentation: Input argument schema for get wallet details action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.get_wallet_details.GetWalletDetailsAction
documentation: Get wallet details action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.trade.trade
documentation:
Trade a specified amount of a from asset to a to asset for the wallet. Trades are only supported on Mainnets.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to trade the asset from.
    amount (str): The amount of the from asset to trade, e.g. `15`, `0.000001`.
    from_asset_id (str): The from asset ID to trade (e.g., "eth", "usdc", or a valid contract address like "0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e").
    to_asset_id (str): The from asset ID to trade (e.g., "eth", "usdc", or a valid contract address like "0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e").

Returns:
    str: A message containing the trade details.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.trade.TradeInput
documentation: Input argument schema for trade action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.trade.TradeAction
documentation: Trade action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.register_basename.register_basename
documentation:
Register a Basename for the agent.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to register the Basename with.
    basename (str): The Basename to assign to the agent.
    amount (str): The amount of ETH to pay for the registration. The default is set to 0.002.

Returns:
    str: Confirmation message with the basename.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.register_basename.create_register_contract_method_args
documentation:
Create registration arguments for Basenames.

Args:
    base_name (str): The Basename (e.g., "example.base.eth" or "example.basetest.eth")
    address_id (str): The Ethereum address
    is_mainnet (bool): True if on mainnet, False if on testnet

Returns:
    dict: Formatted arguments for the register contract method
Function to create registration arguments for Basenames

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.register_basename.RegisterBasenameInput
documentation: Input argument schema for registering a Basename.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.register_basename.RegisterBasenameAction
documentation: Register Basename action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.transfer.transfer
documentation:
Transfer a specified amount of an asset to a destination onchain. USDC Transfers on Base Sepolia and Mainnet can be gasless. Always use the gasless option when available.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to transfer the asset from.
    amount (str): The amount of the asset to transfer, e.g. `15`, `0.000001`.
    asset_id (str): The asset ID to transfer (e.g., "eth", "usdc", or a valid contract address like "0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e").
    destination (str): The destination to transfer the funds (e.g. `0x58dBecc0894Ab4C24F98a0e684c989eD07e4e027`, `example.eth`, `example.base.eth`).
    gasless (bool): Whether to send a gasless transfer (Defaults to False.).

Returns:
    str: A message containing the transfer details.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.transfer.TransferInput
documentation: Input argument schema for transfer action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.transfer.TransferAction
documentation: Transfer action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.utils.get_current_supply
documentation:
Get the current supply of a token.

Args:
    token_address: Address of the token contract, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.utils.get_buy_quote
documentation:
Get quote for buying tokens.

Args:
    network_id: Network ID, which is either `base-sepolia` or `base-mainnet`
    token_address: Address of the token contract, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`
    amount_eth_in_wei: Amount of ETH to buy (in wei), meaning 1 is 1 wei or 0.000000000000000001 of ETH

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.utils.get_sell_quote
documentation:
Get quote for selling tokens.

Args:
    network_id: Network ID, which is either `base-sepolia` or `base-mainnet`
    token_address: Address of the token contract, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`
    amount_tokens_in_wei (str): Amount of tokens to sell (in wei), meaning 1 is 1 wei or 0.000000000000000001 of the token

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.sell_token.wow_sell_token
documentation:
Sell WOW tokens for ETH.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to sell the tokens from.
    contract_address (str): The WOW token contract address, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`
    amount_tokens_in_wei (str): Amount of tokens to sell (in wei), meaning 1 is 1 wei or 0.000000000000000001 of the token

Returns:
    str: A message confirming the sale with the transaction hash

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.sell_token.WowSellTokenInput
documentation: Input argument schema for sell token action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.sell_token.WowSellTokenAction
documentation: Zora Wow sell token action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.buy_token.wow_buy_token
documentation:
Buy a Zora Wow ERC20 memecoin with ETH.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to create the token from.
    contract_address (str): The WOW token contract address, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`
    amount_eth_in_wei (str): Amount of ETH to spend (in wei), meaning 1 is 1 wei or 0.000000000000000001 of ETH

Returns:
    str: A message containing the token purchase details.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.buy_token.WowBuyTokenInput
documentation: Input argument schema for buy token action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.buy_token.WowBuyTokenAction
documentation: Zora Wow buy token action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.create_token.wow_create_token
documentation:
Create a Zora Wow ERC20 memecoin.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to create the token from.
    name (str): The name of the token to create.
    symbol (str): The symbol of the token to create.
    token_uri (str | None): The URI of the token metadata to store on IPFS e.g. ipfs://QmY1GqprFYvojCcUEKgqHeDj9uhZD9jmYGrQTfA9vAE78J.

Returns:
    str: A message containing the token creation details.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.create_token.WowCreateTokenInput
documentation: Input argument schema for create token action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.create_token.WowCreateTokenAction
documentation: Zora Wow create token action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.cdp_action.CdpAction
documentation: CDP Action Base Class.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.deploy_nft.deploy_nft
documentation:
Deploy an NFT (ERC-721) token collection onchain from the wallet.

Args:
    wallet (Wallet): The wallet to deploy the NFT from.
    name (str): The name of the NFT (ERC-721) token collection to deploy, e.g. `Helpful Hippos`.
    symbol (str): The symbol of the NFT (ERC-721) token collection to deploy, e.g. `HIPPO`.
    base_uri (str): The base URI for the NFT (ERC-721) token collection's metadata, e.g. `https://www.helpfulhippos.xyz/metadata/`.

Returns:
    str: A message containing the NFT token deployment details.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.deploy_nft.DeployNftInput
documentation: Input argument schema for deploy NFT action.

classes.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.deploy_nft.DeployNftAction
documentation: Deploy NFT action.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.constants.get_factory_address
documentation:
Get the Zora Wow ERC20 Factory contract address for the specified network.

Args:
    network (str): The network ID to get the contract address for.
        Valid networks are: base-sepolia, base-mainnet.

Returns:
    str: The contract address for the specified network.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the specified network is not supported.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.uniswap.index.create_price_info
documentation:
Create a PriceInfo object from wei amount and ETH price.

Args:
    wei_amount: Amount in wei
    eth_price_in_usd: Current ETH price in USD

Returns:
    PriceInfo: A PriceInfo object containing the amount in ETH and USD

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.uniswap.index.get_has_graduated
documentation:
Check if a token has graduated from the Zora Wow protocol.

Args:
    network_id: Network ID, which is either `base-sepolia` or `base-mainnet`
    token_address: Token address, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`

Returns:
    bool: True if the token has graduated, False otherwise

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.uniswap.index.get_pool_info
documentation:
Get pool info for a given uniswap v3 pool address.

Args:
    network_id: Network ID, which is either `base-sepolia` or `base-mainnet`
    pool_address: Uniswap v3 pool address

Returns:
    PoolInfo: A PoolInfo object containing the token0, balance0, token1, balance1, fee, liquidity, and sqrt_price_x96.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.uniswap.index.exact_input_single
documentation:
Get exact input quote from Uniswap.

Args:
    network_id: Network ID, which is either `base-sepolia` or `base-mainnet`
    token_in: Token address to swap from, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`
    token_out: Token address to swap to, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`
    amount_in: Amount of tokens to swap (in Wei)
    fee: Fee for the swap

Returns:
    int: Amount of tokens to receive (in Wei)

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.uniswap.index.get_uniswap_quote
documentation:
Get Uniswap quote for buying or selling tokens.

Args:
    network_id: Network ID, which is either `base-sepolia` or `base-mainnet`
    token_address: Token address, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`
    amount: Amount of tokens (in Wei)
    quote_type: 'buy' or 'sell'

Returns:
    Quote: A Quote object containing the amount in, amount out, balance, fee, and any error messages.

functions.name: cdp_agentkit_core.actions.wow.uniswap.index.get_pool_address
documentation:
Fetch the uniswap v3 pool address for a given token.

Args:
    token_address (str): The address of the token contract, such as `0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e`

Returns:
    str: The uniswap v3 pool address associated with the token.
